aero_cam_sync.configuration.allow3rdPers: Apply camera tilt in third-person view
aero_cam_sync.configuration.count.toolti: Number of rays used to sample the surface
aero_cam_sync.configuration.downLength.t: Max distance downward from player to detect a surface
aero_cam_sync.configuration.enabled.tool: Enables or disables the entire mod
aero_cam_sync.configuration.ignoreServer: Works regardless of server-side mod presence
aero_cam_sync.configuration.minNormalY.t: Maximum camera tilt angle (0.0 = any, 1.0 = flat only)
aero_cam_sync.configuration.moveCamera.t: Shift camera position along with tilt
aero_cam_sync.configuration.rays.tooltip: Render all raycast lines in the world
aero_cam_sync.configuration.rotateCamera: Tilt the camera based on surface normal
Interpolation speed per frame. 0.0 = instant, 9999 = never
aero_cam_sync.configuration.title: Aeronautics Camera Sync Config
aero_cam_sync.configuration.upLength.too: Vertical offset from feet where raycasts start
